hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | while read -r f; do case "$f" in */my-analysis/*|*/.claude/skills/*|*/.claude/memory/*|*/CLAUDE.md|*/.gitignore) cd /home/dorian/repo/RMDB-2024-Analyze; if echo "$f" | grep -q "my-analysis/00-architecture"; then kw="architecture"; elif echo "$f" | grep -q "my-analysis/01-storage"; then kw="storage"; elif echo "$f" | grep -q "my-analysis/02-record"; then kw="record"; elif echo "$f" | grep -q "my-analysis/03-index"; then kw="index"; elif echo "$f" | grep -q "my-analysis/04-system"; then kw="system"; elif echo "$f" | grep -q "my-analysis/05-transaction"; then kw="transaction"; elif echo "$f" | grep -q "my-analysis/06-execution\|executor"; then kw="executor"; else kw="architecture"; fi; git add "$f" && git commit -m "doc(${kw}): 更新文档" --no-gpg-sign 2>/dev/null && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"已自动提交: '"$f"'"}}' || true ;; esac; done
